texts.content_text1: Upon completion of this module, you should:
texts.content_text20:
Have a clear understanding of basic child psychology and developmental
stages.
texts.content_text21: Recognize the signs and impacts of trauma with regards to child- victims.
texts.content_text22:
Understand the impact of multi-victimization with regards to child –
victims.
texts.content_text23:
Develop basic trauma-informed communication skills to effectively engage
with children.
texts.content_text24:
Develop basic skills in order to build trust and rapport with child victims,
ensuring their active and safe participation in procedures.
texts.content_text25:
Acquire skills for conducting child-sensitive legal interviews and avoiding
re-traumatisation and/or secondary victimisation.
texts.content_text26: Enhance your cultural sensitivity and learn inclusive communication strategies for working with children from diverse cultural backgrounds and other diversities, children with disabilities.
